lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repair. The exterior has noticeable rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn and has some tears in the upholstery.
Mint condition.

This car is an absolute gem in pristine, showroom condition! It has been meticulously cared for, looking and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. With its flawless exterior and spotless interior, this is a rare find for any buyer seeking a vehicle in truly perfect shape.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical or cosmetic defects and appears as new. All service records are complete and up to date.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, reflecting the highest level of care and preservation. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, showroom-quality luster with no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the interior is pristine, with no signs of wear on the upholstery, carpets, or controls. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled environment. Every feature and electronic component operates exactly as intended. This is an exceptional example for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in fair overall condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of age and use. The exterior has a few noticeable scratches and a minor dent on the rear fender, and the paint has begun to fade on the hood. Inside, the cabin is functional, though the upholstery shows some wear and there is a small tear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, but it will likely require a suspension tune-up and new brake pads in the coming months. The air conditioning and heater are both operational. This is an honest, functional vehicle for someone who prioritizes utility over cosmetics.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, it offers a sophisticated driving experience paired with enduring reliability. The exterior retains its refined aesthetic, while the cabin provides a comfortable and well-appointed environment. This is a distinguished choice for those seeking quality and value in a pre-owned automobile.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's in really solid shape! It's been super reliable for me and still looks fantastic cruising down the street. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to jump right into your next adventure without any worries. It’s a wonderful find if you're looking for a dependable car that feels just right. Come check it out and see for yourself!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior scratches. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver. The exterior finish remains vibrant and glossy, showing only minor, expected signs of use that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery and trim holding up beautifully. Every feature, from the premium sound system to the crisp climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in strong form, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures a smooth, confident ride. The engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have significant tread remaining. It is a solid, honest car that delivers a premium experience on every commute.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. With a well-documented service history and a refined presence, it offers a superior driving experience for the pragmatic yet sophisticated owner. We invite you to experience the caliber of this specimen firsthand.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it strikes an ideal balance between refined performance and long-term reliability. This offering delivers exceptional value, providing a sophisticated driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride and it has been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways! It runs beautifully and still looks great parked in the driveway. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great new home!

This mid-engine performance icon features the coveted 3.4L DFI flat-six engine, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is dialed in with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), ensuring exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. Mechanically robust, the drivetrain is free of seepage, and the clutch uptake remains positive with no signs of slippage. Recent preventative maintenance includes a fresh fluid service and inspection of the cooling system's water pump and thermostat. While showing minor cosmetic patina from road use, the structural integrity and high-revving internals make this an ideal candidate for the discerning driver seeking peak analog engagement.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a prime example of pride in ownership. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor, inevitable road marks consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary—smoke-free, with supple seating and all electronic features, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control, functioning perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a rigorous schedule of synthetic oil changes and recent preventative maintenance. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have ample tread remaining for many miles of confident driving. It is a reliable, turn-key car that perfectly balances performance with everyday comfort.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a superior standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit offers reliable performance and a refined driving experience. It represents an outstanding opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that balances proven longevity with a sophisticated presence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Exhibiting commendable mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presentation, this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to ensure consistent performance and reliability. An exemplary choice for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience at a competitive market value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable daily driver that still looks great pulling into any driveway. It runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next big adventure with a new owner! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with a 7,900 RPM redline. This example boasts a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring poly-bushings for improved lateral stability. Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver. The exterior paint retains a deep gloss and shows only the minor, honest signs of road use expected of a car that has been driven with care. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring upholstery that remains supple and a dashboard free of sun damage or cracks. All power features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly, with the engine providing smooth acceleration and the transmission shifting seamlessly. With plenty of tread left on the tires and firm, responsive braking, this car is ready for the road today without needing immediate investment. It is a solid, honest example of a well-loved vehicle that balances performance and comfort perfectly.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term reliability. Subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection by our certified technicians, the car exhibits robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and consistent service history, this selection delivers exceptional value and dependable performance for the modern professional.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. This offering has undergone a comprehensive assessment to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and performance. Representing a superior balance of value and quality, this vehicle is prepared for immediate delivery to a discerning owner who prioritizes long-term dependability and professional-grade maintenance history.

Hi there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a new home! It’s been super well-loved and is in really solid shape for its next adventure. Whether you’re commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to roll and feels fantastic on the road. I've taken great care of it, and I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!

Presenting a mechanically sorted 997.1 Carrera S featuring the 3.8L M97 flat-six, delivering 355hp through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. This example remains in strong driver condition, benefiting from a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recent cooling system overhaul including a low-temp thermostat and water pump. The chassis remains taut, equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and staggered 19-inch alloys wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, showing excellent bite with minimal fade. While the finish shows minor road-patina consistent with its enthusiast ownership, the drivetrain is robust, exhibiting no signs of bore scoring and holding consistent oil pressure. A visceral, analog driving experience optimized for the canyon or the daily commute.
Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Minor exterior scratches. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful driving, while the premium leather interior remains supple, clean, and smoke-free. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and factory-scheduled maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the braking system provides firm, confident stops. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, functions exactly as intended. It is a reliable, eye-catching car that is ready for its next long-distance journey or daily commute without any immediate service needs.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example offers a balanced combination of performance and comfort, having been preserved to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. We invite discerning buyers to experience a vehicle that delivers consistent excellence and represents a superior value proposition in its class.
